commands.review_summary:
The branch advertises Azure Dynamic Sessions as a run-session provider, returns delegated run lease handles, and updates provider tests, docs, the generated provider matrix, and CHANGELOG.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a bug report. Source inspection gives a high-confidence current-main check that Azure Dynamic Sessions lacks FeatureRunSession today, and the PR adds the feature flag plus session-handle return paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This maintainer-authored draft has no narrow automation repair target; it needs normal maintainer readiness, release-note ownership confirmation, and any desired live-provider proof.

target.title: feat(providers): expose azure dynamic sessions
target.body:
## Summary
- advertise Azure Dynamic Sessions as a run-session provider
- return session handles for new, cleanup-failed, keep-on-failure, and reused runs
- document the lease-output behavior and regenerate the provider matrix

## Verification
- go test -count=1 ./internal/providers/azuredynamicsessions
- node scripts/generate-provider-matrix.mjs
- go test -count=1 ./internal/cli -run 'TestRunSessionFeatureRequiresDelegatedBackendAndValidHandle|TestProvidersRecommend(RunSession|ListsUseCases)|TestProviderMatrix|TestValidateRunSessionForSpec'\n- go test -count=1 ./internal/providers/all\n- go test -race -count=1 ./internal/providers/azuredynamicsessions\n- scripts/check-docs.sh\n- go vet ./internal/providers/azuredynamicsessions\n- go run ./cmd/crabbox providers --json | jq -r '.[] | select(.provider=="azure-dynamic-sessions") | [.provider, .kind, (.features|join(","))] | @tsv'\n- git diff --check\n- go test -count=1 ./internal/cli\n
target.author: vincentkoc
